options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Thank you for reaching out and extending the invitation. I truly appreciate the gesture and your enthusiasm about reconnecting. Unfortunately, I have a prior scheduling conflict at that time that I am unable to reschedule. I hope we can find another opportunity to meet up in the future. Please let me know if there are alternative dates that might work better for both of us.

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Hey! Thanks so much for the invite – I'm really excited to catch up! Unfortunately, I've got something already on the calendar that I can't move around. But let's definitely make plans for another time! When you're back in Chicago again, just let me know and we can find a time that works. Looking forward to it!

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Thanks for inviting me! I have a scheduling conflict that time, but let's try to connect when you're back in Chicago – I'll check my calendar and follow up with you.
